title: Semiconductor Stocks Just Wiped $1 Trillion in a Single Day
script: The Nasdaq dropped 4 percent Thursday in one of the worst AI chip selloffs of the year. The trigger: Broadcom held its annual AI chip forecast flat. Investors expected bigger. Micron fell 6 percent. Marvell fell 8. AMD fell 6. Nvidia slid. In one trading session, roughly $1 trillion in market value evaporated from semiconductor stocks. The AI trade isn't broken. But it just got a lot more fragile.
